scripts.build:site: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run index:search
scripts.serve: npm run build:site && npm run preview
scripts.check:links: python3 scripts/check_links.py && python3 scripts/check_link_texts.py && python3 scripts/check_summary_icons.py
scripts.translate:stale: for lang in zh-CN de-DE nl-NL fr-FR es-ES da-DK nb-NO sv-SE ja-JP is-IS fi-FI hu-HU it-IT pl-PL pt-BR ko-KR zh-HK; do python3 scripts/translate_docs.py "$lang" --mode stale; done
scripts.translate:stale:dry-run: for lang in zh-CN de-DE nl-NL fr-FR es-ES da-DK nb-NO sv-SE ja-JP is-IS fi-FI hu-HU it-IT pl-PL pt-BR ko-KR zh-HK; do python3 scripts/translate_docs.py "$lang" --mode stale --dry-run; done
